title: 1.1: Adds a client field of type *http.Client to all 11 detectors' Scanner structs, including abbysale, abstract, abuseipdb, accuweather, adafruitio, adzuna, ...
1.2: Provides a default HTTP client fallback when the Scanner's client field is nil in all 11 detectors, including abbysale, abstract, abuseipdb, accuweather, adafruitio, adzuna, ...

1.3: Extracts the verification logic out of FromData into a separate function or method in all 11 detectors, including verifyAbbysale, verifyAbstract, verifyAbuseIPDB, verifyAccuweather, verifyAdafruitIO, verifyAdzuna, ...

1.4: Ensures all 11 extracted verification functions return both a verification outcome and an error, including verifyAbbysale, verifyAbstract, verifyAbuseIPDB, verifyAccuweather, verifyAdafruitIO, verifyAdzuna, ...
1.5: Captures verification errors on the result using SetVerificationError in all 11 detectors, including abbysale, abstract, abuseipdb, accuweather, adafruitio, adzuna, ...
1.6: Replaces broad status code range checks with explicit handling of specific status codes in all 11 detectors, including abbysale, abstract, abuseipdb, accuweather, adafruitio, adzuna, ...
1.7: Defines all 9 API base URL constants (abbysaleURL, abstractURL, abuseipdbURL, accuweatherURL, adafruitioURL, adzunaURL, aeroworkflowURL, agoraURL, alibabaURL) instead of inline string literals

1.8: Moves the false positive check outside the verification block in all 11 detectors so it runs regardless of the verify flag, including abbysale, abstract, abuseipdb, accuweather, adafruitio, adzuna, ...

1.9: Organizes imports following standard Go grouping conventions in all 9 detector files (abbysale.go, abuseipdb.go, accuweather.go, adafruitio.go, aeroworkflow.go, agora.go, aha.go, alibaba.go, artifactory.go)
1.10: Validates the abuseipdb response body content in addition to the status code
1.11: Treats accuweather HTTP 403 as a verified token rather than an invalid one
1.12: Preserves aha's use of a domain extracted from input data for its API URL
1.13: Surfaces alibaba's structured JSON error responses in the verification error
4.1: Removes or modifies existing public Scanner method signatures (FromData, Keywords, or Type)
